status_definitions.launched: Complete governed layer. All pages published, indexed, hreflang active.
status_definitions.pilot: Partial governed layer. Selected anchor pages published and indexed. Hreflang active for completed pages only. Not a full launch.
status_definitions.in_progress: Translation in progress. Not indexed. No hreflang.
status_definitions.review: Translation complete. Governance review pending. Not indexed.
status_definitions.architecture_defined: Language registered. URL schema defined. No content translated. Not indexed.

layers.name: English
layers.note: Canonical master. Served at root. Frozen as of Sprint 6F.

layers.name: French
layers.note: Pilot launched Sprint 7B. 12 anchor pages indexed. Layer-level indexable remains false; individual pages indexed via translation-map.json. Full launch requires 300 governed pages and DECISION_LOG.md entry.
